title: polygonum heterophyllum subsp. rurivagum
intro: Polygonum heterophyllum subsp. rurivagum, also known as Himalayan snakeroot or Kalmegh, is a plant species that belongs to the Polygonaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Himalayan snakeroot include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. It is often prepared as a decoction or powder, and can be consumed in various herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tablets.
